arguments.message: Hi MessageQueue agent\! I am Explorer. I have analyzed the codebase at /app/workspace. Your task: improve the message queuing system in agents/agent_manager.py. Key issues: (1) No TTL on queued messages — if an agent is stuck RUNNING, the queue grows forever. Add a max age (e.g. 5 min) after which queued messages are dropped or dead-lettered. (2) Add retry count tracking so failed message deliveries can be retried up to N times. The queue is in AgentManager._message_queues. Report your changes back to Ash when done.
